variants.title: Fleetguard FS19766 Fuel Filter/Water Separator | Replaces the Donaldson P550852
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard FS19766 Fuel Filter/Water Separator | Replaces the Donaldson P550852
variants.description: Fleetguard® FS19766 plus size EleMax™ fuel filter protects vital fuel system components.  Its patented control valve provides full use of the filter, fits Fuel Pro® and many Diesel Pro® models, has multiple micron ratings for OEM compliance, and is biodiesel compatible.
specifications: Style: Fuel/Water Separator Cartridge, Outer Diameter: 106.9 mm, Inner Diameter: 16.8 mm, Length: 177.8 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P550852 Fuel/Water Separator Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550852 Fuel/Water Separator Cartridge is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Fuel/Water Separator Cartridge, Outer Diameter: 106.9 mm, Inner Diameter: 16.8 mm, Length: 177.8 mm
